problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region may resolve How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
